note: Canonical entity table. See docs/registry-entity-model.md. Hand-curated via the console Entity Workspace; bootstrapped by scripts/bootstrap-registry.mjs.

entities.name: Boxes and Lines
entities.description: General-purpose node-edge diagrams with groups and tags

entities.name: Cycle
entities.description: Cyclical process visualization (PDCA, OODA, DevOps loops)

entities.name: Gantt
entities.description: Project scheduling with task dependencies and milestones

entities.name: Infrastructure
entities.description: Infrastructure traffic flow with RPS computation

entities.name: Journey Map
entities.description: User experience flow with emotion scores, phases, and annotations

entities.name: Map
entities.description: Geographic concept map: highlight/score regions, drop points of interest, connect with routes or edges

entities.name: Mind Map
entities.description: Radial hierarchy of ideas branching from a central topic

entities.name: PERT
entities.description: Project network with three-point estimates, critical path, and uncertainty (Beta-PERT, Monte Carlo)

entities.name: Pyramid
entities.description: Stacked hierarchy of layers with descriptions (Maslow, DIKW)

entities.name: RACI Matrix
entities.description: Tasks × roles responsibility matrix with constraint linting

entities.name: Ring
entities.description: Concentric rings showing nested or hierarchical categories (read core-out)

entities.name: Sequence
entities.description: Message request and response interaction flows

entities.name: Wireframe
entities.description: Low-fidelity UI layout with panels, controls, and annotations
